summary: Comprehensive testing of Stamp Settings/Templates feature (VeriStamp-inspired) completed successfully. All CRUD operations, VeriStamp UI elements, template selector, and one-click application features are working correctly. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/stamp-templates - creates template with all VeriStamp fields (layout, position_preset, stamp_size, logo_size, opacity, margin_from_edge)
POST /api/stamp-templates - creates templates with all 5 layout options (horizontal, vertical, compact, logo_left, logo_right)
POST /api/stamp-templates/{id}/set-default - sets template as default, unsets others
Error handling for non-existent templates (404 responses)
Authentication required for all template endpoints (401 without token)
Default template auto-applies on page load
Template fields match stamping API requirements
frontend_ui_tests: Stamp Settings navigation link visible in sidebar
My Templates tab shows template cards with all details (name, document type, stamp type, layout, color, size, opacity)
Create New tab shows VeriStamp-inspired UI with Template Details, Stamp Layout, Position & Size, Branding sections
5 layout options available (Horizontal, Vertical, Compact, Logo Left, Logo Right)
Position & Size sliders working (Stamp Size, Logo Size, Opacity, Margin from Edge)
Page Position Preview with draggable stamp indicator
Stamp Preview with live settings summary
Save Template button creates template with toast notification
Set Default button updates default template with toast notification
Default badge appears on default template
Edit and Delete buttons functional on template cards
Quick Templates section visible on Document Stamping page
One-click template application with toast notification
Default template auto-applies on Document Stamping page load
Template override message displayed when template is applied

seed_data_creation: Two test templates exist: 'Contract Template' (default) and 'Affidavit Template'. UI Test Template was created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stamp Settings/Templates feature fully tested and working. VeriStamp-inspired UI includes: 5 layout options, position/size sliders, page position preview with draggable stamp, stamp preview with live settings. Template selector on Document Stamping page shows Quick Templates with one-click application. Default template auto-applies on page load. All CRUD operations working via both API and UI.

stamp_settings_navigation.details: Stamp Settings link visible in sidebar, navigates to /stamp-settings

template_selector_on_document_page.details: Quick Templates section shows all templates with one-click application

one_click_template_application.details: Clicking template button applies settings with toast notification

default_template_auto_apply.details: Default template auto-applies on Document Stamping page load with toast notification

template_override_during_stamping.details: Message 'Using template settings. You can override any option below.' displayed
